MarioBV10: calls 40

MarioBV10: calls 280

AlfaOmega971 collected 920 from pot

scorza23: posts big blind 20

scorza23: raises 40 to 100
AlfaOmega971: calls 40
*** FLOP *** [8d 3h Jc]
scorza23: bets 400 and is all-in
